news.title: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
news.summary: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump.

news.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
news.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.

news.title: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
news.summary: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Ceremonies will be held across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.

news.title: UK and France agree with Oman to ensure safety of its territorial waters
news.summary: France says it has deployed mine countermeasures to the Middle East, including two mine-hunting ships. France said it has deployed mine counter Measures to the Mideast.

news.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
news.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International. The company owned just one deli.

news.title: When it comes to beating the stock market, no news really is good news
news.summary: A new study has found a flaw in how people interpret the very headlines they are seeing. The study was published in the Journal of Social Psychology.

news.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in July 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
news.summary: This month is a good month to save on streaming, despite the return of ‘Enola Holmes’ to Netflix and ‘Silo” to Apple.

news.title: Record beef imports are flooding the U.S. — so why is your Fourth of July BBQ so expensive?
news.summary: Washington’s recipe for high costs — import more meat — only grills your wallet. Beef prices are sizzling and Washington’S recipe to high costs is importing more meat.

news.title: Your aging parent has a new romance. Here’s how to protect your inheritance — without looking greedy.
news.summary: Talk with your single mom or dad about estate-planning issues before they remarries. Talk with them about estate planning before they get married or divorced.

news.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
news.summary: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.
